applicability: All production iOS targets, extensions, SDK integrations, network adapters, external input handlers, WebViews, credential stores, secret delivery, and logging paths
exception_policy: Security exceptions require named human authority, exact asset and data class, residual risk, compensating controls, owner, expiry, review event, and removal plan.
rationale: Protect authentication, local storage, network trust, untrusted inputs, embedded web content, secrets, and operational events while consuming the Data Lifecycle-owned classification taxonomy.
review_cadence: Quarterly and before release when assets, authentication, trust boundaries, public entry points, WebViews, secret delivery, logging, or security-relevant SDKs change.
title: Mobile Security
